_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Arclight
author: you@example.com
description: Arclight is a hybrid Minecraft server that combines Bukkit/Spigot plugin support with Forge, NeoForge, or Fabric mod support in a single server, powered by Mixin. Run plugins and mods side by side.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Arclight Installation Script for Pelican Panel
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server

apt-get update -y
apt-get install -y curl jq

if [[ ! -d /mnt/server ]]; then
    mkdir -p /mnt/server
fi

cd /mnt/server

# Trim whitespace from variables
ARCLIGHT_LOADER="$(echo "${ARCLIGHT_LOADER}" | tr -d ' ' | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')"
MC_VERSION="$(echo "${MC_VERSION}" | tr -d ' ')"
ARCLIGHT_VERSION="$(echo "${ARCLIGHT_VERSION}" | tr -d ' ')"

# Validate loader
if [[ "${ARCLIGHT_LOADER}" != "neoforge" && "${ARCLIGHT_LOADER}" != "forge" && "${ARCLIGHT_LOADER}" != "fabric" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: Invalid loader '${ARCLIGHT_LOADER}'. Must be one of: neoforge, forge, fabric"
    exit 1
fi

echo "====================================="
echo " Arclight Installer"
echo " Loader  : ${ARCLIGHT_LOADER}"
echo " MC Ver  : ${MC_VERSION}"
echo " AL Ver  : ${ARCLIGHT_VERSION:-latest}"
echo "====================================="

GITHUB_API="https://api.github.com/repos/IzzelAliz/Arclight"

# Fetch releases from GitHub API
echo "Fetching releases from GitHub..."
if [[ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN}" ]]; then
    RELEASES=$(curl -s -H "Authorization: token ${GITHUB_TOKEN}" "${GITHUB_API}/releases")
else
    RELEASES=$(curl -s "${GITHUB_API}/releases")
fi

if [[ -z "${RELEASES}" || "${RELEASES}" == "null" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: Could not fetch releases from GitHub API."
    exit 1
fi

# If a specific Arclight version is set, find that exact release tag
if [[ -n "${ARCLIGHT_VERSION}" && "${ARCLIGHT_VERSION}" != "latest" ]]; then
    echo "Looking for specific Arclight release: ${ARCLIGHT_VERSION}"
    # Try exact tag match (e.g. "FeudalKings/1.0.1" or just "1.0.1")
    RELEASE=$(echo "${RELEASES}" | jq --arg ver "${ARCLIGHT_VERSION}" \
        '[.[] | select(.tag_name | test($ver; "i"))] | first')
else
    echo "Using the latest stable (non-prerelease) release..."
    RELEASE=$(echo "${RELEASES}" | jq '[.[] | select(.prerelease == false)] | first')
    # If no stable found, fall back to the very latest
    if [[ "$(echo "${RELEASE}" | jq -r '.tag_name')" == "null" ]]; then
        echo "No stable release found, falling back to latest release."
        RELEASE=$(echo "${RELEASES}" | jq 'first')
    fi
fi

RELEASE_TAG=$(echo "${RELEASE}" | jq -r '.tag_name')
if [[ -z "${RELEASE_TAG}" || "${RELEASE_TAG}" == "null" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: No matching release found."
    exit 1
fi

echo "Using release: ${RELEASE_TAG}"

# List assets for this release
ASSETS=$(echo "${RELEASE}" | jq -r '.assets[] | .name + "|||" + .browser_download_url')

if [[ -z "${ASSETS}" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: No assets found for release ${RELEASE_TAG}."
    exit 1
fi

echo "Available assets:"
echo "${ASSETS}" | while IFS='|||' read -r name url; do echo "  - ${name}"; done

# Find the asset matching our loader (and optionally MC version)
# Asset naming pattern: arclight-{loader}-{mc_version}-{arclight_version}-{commit}.jar
if [[ -n "${MC_VERSION}" && "${MC_VERSION}" != "latest" ]]; then
    MATCH=$(echo "${ASSETS}" | grep -i "arclight-${ARCLIGHT_LOADER}-${MC_VERSION}-" | head -n 1)
else
    MATCH=$(echo "${ASSETS}" | grep -i "arclight-${ARCLIGHT_LOADER}-" | head -n 1)
fi

if [[ -z "${MATCH}" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: No asset found for loader '${ARCLIGHT_LOADER}' and MC version '${MC_VERSION}' in release ${RELEASE_TAG}."
    echo "Available assets for this release:"
    echo "${ASSETS}" | cut -d'|' -f1
    exit 1
fi

ASSET_NAME=$(echo "${MATCH}" | cut -d'|' -f1)
DOWNLOAD_URL=$(echo "${MATCH}" | cut -d'|' -f4)

echo ""
echo "Downloading: ${ASSET_NAME}"
echo "From: ${DOWNLOAD_URL}"

# Back up existing jar if present
if [[ -f "${SERVER_JARFILE}" ]]; then
    echo "Backing up existing ${SERVER_JARFILE}..."
    mv "${SERVER_JARFILE}" "${SERVER_JARFILE}.bak"
fi

# Download the jar
curl -L --fail --silent --show-error -o "${SERVER_JARFILE}" "${DOWNLOAD_URL}"

if [[ $? -ne 0 || ! -f "${SERVER_JARFILE}" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: Download failed. Restoring backup if available."
    [[ -f "${SERVER_JARFILE}.bak" ]] && mv "${SERVER_JARFILE}.bak" "${SERVER_JARFILE}"
    exit 1
fi

FILE_SIZE=$(du -sh "${SERVER_JARFILE}" | cut -f1)
echo ""
echo "====================================="
echo " Installation complete!"
echo " File   : ${SERVER_JARFILE} (${FILE_SIZE})"
echo " Release: ${RELEASE_TAG}"
echo " Asset  : ${ASSET_NAME}"
echo "====================================="
echo "Start the server to finish setup (EULA acceptance will be prompted)."

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: The filename for the downloaded Arclight jar. Change this only if you know what you are doing.

variables.name: Mod Loader
variables.description:
The mod loader to use: neoforge, forge, or fabric.

Note: As of Minecraft 1.21, only NeoForge and Fabric are available. Forge support for 1.21+ is not guaranteed.

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description:
The Minecraft version to install (e.g. 1.21.1, 1.20.1).

Leave blank or set to 'latest' to automatically pick the most recent release from GitHub.

variables.name: Arclight Version / Release Tag
variables.description:
Specific Arclight release tag to install (e.g. 1.0.1 or FeudalKings/1.0.1).

Leave blank or set to 'latest' to automatically use the newest stable GitHub release.
